```{r clinical-actionability-display, results='asis'}
if (is.null(escat)) {
  cat("\n::: {.callout-warning}\nESCAT classification data not available.\n:::\n")
} else {
  # Extract the enriched ESCAT results tibble
  escat_data <- if (is.data.frame(escat)) {
    escat
  } else if ("escat_results" %in% names(escat)) {
    escat$escat_results
  } else {
    NULL
  }

  if (is.null(escat_data) || nrow(escat_data) == 0) {
    cat("\n::: {.callout-note}\nNo alterations classified by ESCAT.\n:::\n")
  } else {
    # Count actionable (tier I-III)
    n_actionable <- sum(escat_data$escat_tier %in% c("I", "II", "III"))

    # Summary box
    cat(glue('
::: {{.callout-tip}}
## Actionability Summary
**{n_actionable} actionable alteration(s)** identified (ESCAT Tiers I--III).
{if (n_actionable > 0) "See table below for matched therapies and evidence levels." else "No standard-of-care or investigational targets with strong evidence identified."}
:::
'))
    cat("\n\n")
  }
}
```

```{r clinical-actionability-table}
if (!is.null(escat_data) && nrow(escat_data) > 0) {
  # ESCAT tier color mapping (matches esmo_helpers.R)
  tier_colors <- c(
    "I"    = "#d32f2f",
    "I-R"  = "#e57373",
    "II"   = "#f57c00",
    "II-R" = "#ffb74d",
    "III"  = "#fbc02d",
    "IV"   = "#7cb342",
    "V"    = "#42a5f5",
    "X"    = "#9e9e9e"
  )

  # Build display table
  action_display <- escat_data |>
    mutate(
      tier_badge = glue(
        '<span class="escat-badge" style="background-color:{tier_colors[escat_tier] %||% "#9e9e9e"}">ESCAT {escat_tier}</span>'
      ),
      oncokb_level = coalesce(sensitive_level, "") |>
        str_replace("LEVEL_", "Level ")
    ) |>
    select(
      Gene            = gene,
      Alteration      = alteration,
      `ESCAT Tier`    = tier_badge,
      `OncoKB Level`  = oncokb_level,
      `Matched Therapies` = any_of(c("drugs", "treatments")),
      `FDA Approved`  = any_of(c("fda_approved"))
    ) |>
    arrange(match(escat_data$escat_tier, names(tier_colors)))

  action_display |>
    gt() |>
    tab_header(
      title = md("**Clinical Actionability — ESCAT Classification**"),
      subtitle = md("*Sorted by ESCAT tier (highest actionability first)*")
    ) |>
    fmt_markdown(columns = `ESCAT Tier`) |>
    cols_align(align = "center", columns = any_of(c("ESCAT Tier", "OncoKB Level", "FDA Approved"))) |>
    sub_missing(missing_text = "—") |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
      locations = cells_body(columns = Gene)
    ) |>
    tab_style(
      style = cell_fill(color = "#fafafa"),
      locations = cells_body(rows = seq(1, nrow(action_display), by = 2))
    ) |>
    tab_options(
      table.width = pct(100),
      table.font.size = px(12),
      heading.align = "left",
      table.border.top.color = "#1565c0",
      table.border.top.width = px(3),
      data_row.padding = px(6)
    )
}
```
